---
title: "Gottheit"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-gottheit">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



Gottesname + Epitheton/-a


Beide Bestandteile sind nicht verpflichtend. Ein Gott kann nur durch seinen Namen, durch sein Epitheton, seine Epitheta oder durch eine Kombination dieser Möglichkeiten genannt werden.


## Typische Determinative

<div class='tableFixHead table-fixed'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> männlich </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> weiblich </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0001_A40_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0010_G7_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0020_R8_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0001_B7_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0010_I64_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0020_H8_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0030_H8_02.png){.glyph} </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Göttertabellen

<details><summary>Öffne Göttertabellen</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Spezifische Determinative </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Name </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Spezifische Epitheta </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/271' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 271' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 271 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>271</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0001_st_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0010_st_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0020_st_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0030_st_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0040_st_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Isis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mw.t-nṯr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/69170' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 69170' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 69170 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>69170</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0001_mw.t-nTr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0010_mw.t-nTr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0020_mw.t-nTr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Gottesmutter </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wr.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/47420' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 47420' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 47420 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>47420</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/02_wr.t/0010_wr.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/02_wr.t/0010_wr.t_Sp._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die Große </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/26060' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 26060' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 26060 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>26060</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0001_Jmn_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0010_Jmn_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0020_Jmn_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Amun </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>

  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m jp.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/26250' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 26250' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 26250 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>26250</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> (Amun) in Luxor </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn-rꜥ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/500004' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 500004' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 500004 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>500004</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Amun-Re </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn-rꜥ-ḥr-ꜣḫ.ti*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/853481' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 853481' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 853481 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>853481</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0001_jmstj_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0010_jmstj_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0020_jmstj_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0030_jmstj_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0040_jmstj_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0050_jmstj_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0060_jmstj_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Amset </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ini-ḥr.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/26850' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 26850' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 26850 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>26850</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0001_jnj-Hr.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0010_jnj-Hr.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0020_jnj-Hr.t_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0030_jnj-Hr.t_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0040_jnj-Hr.t_05.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0050_jnj-Hr.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Onuris </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *inpw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/27360' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 27360' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 27360 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>27360</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0001_Jnpw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0010_Jnpw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0020_Jnpw_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0030_Jnpw_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0040_Jnpw_sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/det/0001_Jnpw_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Anubis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imi-wt*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/25390' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 25390' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 25390 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>25390</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0001_jmj-wt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0010_jmj-wt_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0020_jmj-wt_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0030_jmj-wt_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Imiut </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ ḏsr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400939' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400939' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400939 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400939</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/02_nb-tA-Dsr/0001_nb-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *tpi ḏw⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/600421' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 600421' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 600421 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>600421</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0001_tp.j-Dw=f_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0010_tp.j-Dw=f_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0020_tp.j.Dw=f_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0030_tp.j-Dw=f_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der auf seinem Berg </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnti sḥ-nṯr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/119260' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 119260' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 119260 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>119260</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0001_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0010_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0020_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0030_xnt.j-sH-nTr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0040_xnt.j-sH-nTr_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0050_xnt.j-sH-nTr_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0060_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0070_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0080_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der vor der Gotteshalle ist </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *itm*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/33040' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 33040' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 33040 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>33040</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0001_Jtm_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0010_Jtm_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0020_Jtm_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0030_Jtm_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0040_Jtm_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0050_Jtm_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0060_Jtm_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Atum </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *iwn.wy*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/22900' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 22900' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 22900 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>22900</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/epitheta/01_jwnwy/0001_jwnwy_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/epitheta/01_jwnwy/0010_jwnwy_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Heliopolitaner </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *itn*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/850317' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 850317' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 850317 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>850317</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0001_jtn_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0010_jtn_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0020_jtn_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0030_jtn_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0040_jtn_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Aton </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ ḥr-ꜣḫ.ti ḥꜥy m ꜣḫ.t m rn⸗f m jt Rꜥ jy m jtn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/01_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn/0001_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/01_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn/0010_m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Es lebe der horizontische Horus (Re-Harachte), der im Lichtland (am Horizont) jubelt in seinem Namen als Schu, der in der Sonnenscheibe (Aton) ist </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ rꜥ-ḥqꜣ-ꜣḫ.ti ḥꜥy m ꜣḫ.t m rn⸗f m šw nty m jtn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/02_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn/0001_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/02_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn/0010_m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Es lebe Re, der horizontische Herrscher, der im Lichtland (am Horizont) jubelt in seinem Namen als Re, der Vater, der als Sonnenscheibe (Aton) kommt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pꜣ itn ꜥnḫ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/06_pA-jtn-anx/0001_pA-jtn-anx_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die lebende Sonnenscheibe </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *jmj itn⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/08_jmj-jtn=f/0001_jmj-jtn=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> in seiner Sonnenscheibe </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wpi-wꜣ.wt*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/45580' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 45580' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 45580 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>45580</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0001_wpj-wA.wt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0010_wpj-wA.wt_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0020_wpj-wA.wt_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0040_wpj-wA.wt_04.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Wepwaut </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wsir*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/49460' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 49460' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 49460 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>49460</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0001_wsjr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0010_wsjr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0020_wsjr_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0030_wsjr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0040_wsjr_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0050_wsjr_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0060_wsjr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0070_wsjr_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0080_wsjr_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0090_wsjr_GR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/det/0001_wsjr_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Osiris </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ꜣbḏw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400976' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400976' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400976 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400976</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0001_nb-AbDw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0010_nb-AbDw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0020_nb-AbDw_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0030_nb-AbDw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0040_nb-AbDw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Adydos </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ḏd.w*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400982' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400982' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400982 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400982</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0001_nb-Dd.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0010_nb-Dd.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0020_nb-Dd.w_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0030_nb-Dd.w_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0040_nb-Dd.w_05.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0050_nb-Dd.w_06.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0060_nb-Dd.w_07.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0070_nb-Dd.w_08.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0080_nb-Dd.w_Pyr._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Pyr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Busiris </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ ḏsr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400939' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400939' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400939 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400939</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/03_nb-tA-Dsr/0001_nb-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m tꜣ ḏsr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/169370' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 169370' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 169370 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>169370</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/04_m-tA-Dsr/0001_m-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> im heiligen Land </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y imn.ty.w*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/119180' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 119180' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 119180 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>119180</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0001_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0010_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0020_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0030_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0040_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_Pyr._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Pyr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0050_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0060_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_typ.-ab-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(ab NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste der Westlichen (Chontamenti) </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y imn.ty.w*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/850240' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 850240' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 850240 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>850240</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/06_xnt.y-jmn.t.t/0001_xnt.y-jmn.t.t_seit-NR_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/06_xnt.y-jmn.t.t/0010_xnt.y-jmn.t.t_seit-NR_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste des Westens (Chontamenti) </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y tꜣ ḏsr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/450749' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 450749' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 450749 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>450749</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/07_xnt.y-tA-Dsr/0001_xnt.y-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste des heiligen Landes<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>der Erste des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *bꜣst.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/53640' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 53640' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 53640 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>53640</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0001_bAst.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0010_bAst.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0020_bAst.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Bastet </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *bḥd.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/850566' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 850566' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 850566 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>850566</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0001_bHd.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0010_bHd.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0020_bHd.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0030_bHd.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Behedeti </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pri m ꜣh.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/851332' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 851332' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 851332 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>851332</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/epitheta/01_prj-m-Ax.t/0001_prj-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der aus der Horizont hervorkommt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣb šw.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/550420' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 550420' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 550420 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>550420</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Buntgefiederter </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *psḏ.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/62500' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 62500' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 62500 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>62500</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0001_psD.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0010_psD.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0020_psD.t_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0030_psD.t_AR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0040_psD.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0050_psD.t_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0060_psD.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0070_psD.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0001_psD.t_det_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0010_psD.t_det_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0020_psD.t_det_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0030_psD.t_det_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Götterneunheit </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥ.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/500407' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 500407' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 500407 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>500407</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0001_aA.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0010_aA.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0020_aA.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0030_aA.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0040_aA.t_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0050_aA.t_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die große </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nḏs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/500408' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 500408' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 500408 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>500408</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ptḥ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/62980' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 62980' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 62980 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>62980</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0001_mAa.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0010_mAa.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0020_mAa.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0030_mAa.t_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0040_mAa.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0050_mAa.t_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0060_mAa.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0070_mAa.t_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0080_mAa.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0090_mAa.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Maat </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mnw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/70530' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 70530' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 70530 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>70530</a></span></span> </td>

  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mw.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/69030' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 69030' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 69030 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>69030</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/0001_mw.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/0010_mw.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/0020_mw.t_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Mut </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.t išrw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/853771' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 853771' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 853771 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>853771</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0001_nb.t-jSrw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0010_nb.t-jSrw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0020_nb.t-jSrw_GR_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Die Herrin des Hufeisensees </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mnṯw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/71660' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 71660' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 71660 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>71660</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0001_mnTw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0010_mnTw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0020_mnTw_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0030_mnTw_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0040_mnTw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/det/0001_mnTw_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/det/0010_mnTw_det_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Month </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb wꜣs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/850777' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 850777' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 850777 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>850777</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0001_nb-WAs.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0010_nb-WAs.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0020_nb-WAs.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0030_nb-WAs.t_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0040_nb-WAs.t_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0050_nb-WAs.t_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0060_nb-WAs.t_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0070_nb-WAs.t_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>  </sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Theben </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ni.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/79010' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 79010' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 79010 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>79010</a></span></span> </td>

  <tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥw.t-ḥr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/99960' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 99960' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 99960 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>99960</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0001_Hwt-Hr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0010_Hwt-Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0020_Hwt-Hr_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hathor </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥp*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104000' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 104000' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 104000 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>104000</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0001_Hp_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0010_Hp_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0020_Hp_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0030_Hp_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0001_Hp_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0010_Hp_det_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0020_Hp_det_AR-SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Apis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/853239' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 853239' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 853239 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>853239</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/epitheta/01_anx/0001_anx_seit-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Lebende </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥpy*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104090' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 104090' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 104090 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>104090</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0001_Hpy_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0010_Hpy_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0020_Hpy_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0030_Hpy_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0040_Hpy_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0050_Hpy_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0060_Hpy_MR-NR-GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR; NR; Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/det/0001_Hpy_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/det/0010_Hpy_det_AR_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hapi (Horussohn) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/107500' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 107500' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 107500 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>107500</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0001_Hr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0010_Hr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0020_Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0030_Hr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Horus </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m ꜣḫ.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/704928' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 704928' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 704928 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>704928</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> im Horizont </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nd it⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/550431' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 550431' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 550431 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>550431</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_nD-jt_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der seinen Vater grüßt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pꜣ ẖrd*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/853040' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 853040' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 853040 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>853040</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_pA-Xrd_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> das Kind </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ ꜣs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/853039' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 853039' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 853039 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>853039</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_sA-s.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sohn der Isis </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *smꜣ tꜣ.wy*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/858652' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 858652' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 858652 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>858652</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_smA-tA.wj_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Vereiniger der beiden Länder </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/550351' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 550351' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 550351 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>550351</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_wr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Große </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr-ꜣḫ.ti*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/107800' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 107800' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 107800 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>107800</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0001_Hr-Axtj_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0010_Hr-Axtj_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0020_Hr-Axtj_03.png){.glyph} </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Harachte </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥqt*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/110310' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 110310' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 110310 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>110310</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0340_Heqet/0001_Hqt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0340_Heqet/0010_Hqt_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Heqet </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnsw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/118720' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 118720' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 118720 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>118720</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Chons </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m wꜣs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/860012' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 860012' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 860012 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>860012</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/epitheta/01-m-wAs.t/0001_m-WAs.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/epitheta/01-m-wAs.t/0010_m-WAs.t_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> in Theben </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pꜣ iri sḫr.w m wꜣs.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/860013' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 860013' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 860013 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>860013</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/epitheta/02-pA-jrj-sxr.w-m-WAs.t/0001_pA-jrj-sxr.w-m-WAs.t_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der die Pläne in Theben macht </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ẖnm.w*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/123590' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 123590' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 123590 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>123590</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0001_Xnm.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0010_Xnm.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0020_Xnm.w_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0030_Xnm.w_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0040_Xnm.w_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0050_Xnm.w_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Chnum </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sbk*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/132180' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 132180' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 132180 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>132180</a></span></span> </td>

  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *srq.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/139850' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 139850' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 139850 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>139850</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sḫm.t*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/142250' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 142250' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 142250 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>142250</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sachmet </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *skr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/146890' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 146890' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 146890 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>146890</a></span></span> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sokar </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *stẖ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/148520' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 148520' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 148520 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>148520</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0001_stX_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0010_stX_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0020_stX_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0030_stX_MR-SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR; Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0040_stX_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0050_stX_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0060_stX_D.18_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0070_stX_D.18_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0080_stX_D.19_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.19)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0090_stX_D.19_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.19)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0100_stX_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/0110_stX_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/det/0001_stX_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/det/0010_stX_det_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0410_Seth/det/0020_stX_det_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Seth </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/152710' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 152710' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 152710 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>152710</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0001_Sw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0010_Sw_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0020_Sw_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0030_Sw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0040_Sw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Schu </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *qbḥ-snw⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/160390' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 160390' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 160390 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>160390</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0001_qbH-snw=f_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0010_qbH-snw=f_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0020_qbH-snw=f_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0030_qbH-snw=f_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0040_qbH-snw=f_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0050_qbH-snw=f_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0060_qbH-snw=f_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0070_qbH-snw=f_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0080_qbH-snw=f_GR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/det/0001_qbH-snw=f_det_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/det/0010_qbH-snw=f_det_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Qebehsenuef </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *dwꜣ-mw.t⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/178060' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 178060' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 178060 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>178060</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0001_dwA-mw.t=f_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0010_dwA-mw.t=f_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0020_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0030_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0040_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Duamutef </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḏḥwty*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/185290' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 185290' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 185290 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>185290</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0001_DHwtj_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0010_DHwtj_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0020_DHwtj_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0030_DHwtj_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0040_DHwtj_MR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0050_DHwtj_MR_05.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0060_DHwtj_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0070_DHwtj_SP_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0080_DHwtj_SP-GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.; Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0090_DHwtj_SP-GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.; Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/det/0001_DHwtj_det_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Thot </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details>

```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
